message.content:
@startuml
skinparam sequenceStyle {
    actorStyle {
        fillcolor: #f0f0f0
        fontColor: #333
    }
    interfaceStyle {
        fillcolor: #f0f0f0
        fontColor: #333
    }
    databaseStyle {
        fillcolor: #f0f0f0
        fontColor: #333
    }
    messageStyle {
        fillcolor: #ffffff
        border: 2px solid #000
        fontColor: #000
    }
}

participant "CNBRPfwPlayCtl" as P1
participant "CNBRPfwUICtl" as P2
participant "CNBRUIMgr" as P3
participant "INBRPlayCCSink" as P4
participant "INBRCommand" as P5
participant "CNBRPlayMgr" as P6
participant "CNBRPlayBar" as P7
participant "CWbxBmpButton" as P8

participant "INBRPlayCCSink" as Sink
participant "CNBRPfwPlayCtl" as Pfc
participant "CNBRPfwUICtl" as Pui
participant "INBRCommand" as Cmd
participant "CNBRUIMgr" as Uimgr
participant "CNBRPlayMgr" as Pmgr
participant "CNBRPlayBar" as Pbar
participant "CWbxBmpButton" as Cb

message "nmac notify nbr_pfw mute message" as Msg
